XMLDB.COMMENT: Nucleus federation common — shared vocabulary tables (course families + versions) that travel between hub and spoke Moodles per ADR-014.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleuscommon_family
TABLE.COMMENT: A course family: stable identity for a course across all of its versions. The same family exists as a local row on the hub and on each spoke that has pulled it; rows are bridged across instances by the 'guid' column (UUID), which is the wire identity.

FIELD.NAME: guid
FIELD.COMMENT: Global UUID identity. Set by the hub at family creation and preserved verbatim when the family is mirrored onto a spoke via pull.

FIELD.NAME: slug
FIELD.COMMENT: Human-readable stable identifier, e.g. 'acme-intro-to-safeguarding'. Immutable after creation.

FIELD.NAME: hubfederationid
FIELD.COMMENT: Control-plane federation id the family originated from. Used by spokes to resolve which hub to pull snapshots from.

FIELD.NAME: catalogvisible
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether this family is listed in the federation catalog browser. Hub admins can unlist a family to stop new spokes adopting it while existing pulls keep updating.

FIELD.NAME: createdbyid
FIELD.COMMENT: Local Moodle user id of the creator.

INDEX.NAME: slug_per_fed
INDEX.COMMENT: Slugs are unique per federation; the same slug in a different federation is a different family.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleuscommon_version
TABLE.COMMENT: An immutable published snapshot of a family at a point in time. Same row mirrored on hub (record of publish) and spoke (record of what the local instance is pinned to). Bridged across instances by 'guid'.

FIELD.NAME: guid
FIELD.COMMENT: Global UUID identity of this version. Preserved when mirrored onto a spoke via pull.

FIELD.NAME: versionnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: Semver-lite tag chosen by the publisher: '1.0.0', '1.1.0', '2.0.0', etc. Never re-used within a family.

FIELD.NAME: severity
FIELD.COMMENT: major | minor | patch — author intent at publish time, drives notification urgency.

FIELD.NAME: snapshotref
FIELD.COMMENT: Opaque reference to the .mbz blob in control-plane storage, e.g. 'cp://versions/{guid}.mbz'. Null between version row creation and upload completion.

FIELD.NAME: snapshothash
FIELD.COMMENT: SHA-256 hex of the .mbz for integrity checks on pull.

FIELD.NAME: hubcourseid
FIELD.COMMENT: mdl_course.id the snapshot was taken from (on the hub). Purely informational on spokes.

FIELD.NAME: publishedbyid
FIELD.COMMENT: Local Moodle user id of the publisher (on the hub). Informational on spokes.

FIELD.NAME: releasenotes
FIELD.COMMENT: Author-written summary of what changed. Required for minor and major; optional for patch.

FIELD.NAME: manifest
FIELD.COMMENT: ADR-021 Tier A — JSON dependency manifest extracted at publish time from moodle_backup.xml. Lists the Moodle version + activity-mod plugin set the backup expects. Spokes consult before pulling. Null on legacy rows; spokes treat null as 'no manifest, allow pull but log'.

FIELD.NAME: deprecated
FIELD.COMMENT: Hub-side flag: this version should no longer be pulled and existing instances should consider rollback or upgrade.

FIELD.NAME: lockedforspokeedit
FIELD.COMMENT: Content-distribution flag — when set, the spoke applies capability overrides at the restored course context to block editingteacher edits. Set at publish time on the hub, mirrored to spokes. Default 0 (editable) preserves the prior behaviour for federations that don't need this.

INDEX.NAME: version_per_family
INDEX.COMMENT: Version numbers are unique within a family.

INDEX.NAME: family_timepublished
INDEX.COMMENT: Ordered listing of a family's versions.
